title: These 7 Seven Financial Companies Are Making Money Hand Over Fist as Interest Rates Surge
text: After a decade and a half of ultra-low interest rates, banks are finally making good money on interest income.

title: Why Huntington Bancshares' Stock Rose Today
text: The bank reported earnings results for the third quarter of the year.

title: Huntington Bancshares takes long view as other banks scramble on mortgages, auto loans and lower deposits
text: Huntington Bancshares Corp. stock rallied Friday as the financial-services company raised its outlook for net interest income above Wall Street estimates while acknowledging the economic headwinds that have been challenging banks during the third-quarter earnings season.

title: Are You Looking for a High-Growth Dividend Stock?
text: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) have what it takes?

title: Huntington Bancshares rallies on hiked net interest income outlook
text: Huntington Bancshares Inc. HBAN, +8.41% rose 7.9% on Friday after the financial services company forecast stronger-than-expected net interest income as the company said it's been performing "exceptionally well" despite economic headwinds in the sector. Huntington hiked its view for net interest income in the fourth quarter to rise in the high 20% to low 30% range over the year-ago period, up from its earlier estimate for an increase in the low-to-mid 20% range.

title: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (HBAN) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (NASDAQ:HBAN ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call October 21, 2022 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Tim Sedabres - Director, Investor Relations Steve Steinour - Chairman, President & Chief Executive Officer Zach Wasserman - Chief Financial Officer Rich Pohle - Chief Credit Officer Conference Call Participants Betsy Graseck - Morgan Stanley Scott Siefers - Piper Sandler Steven Alexopoulos - JPMorgan Ken Usdin - Jefferies Jon Arfstrom - RBC Matt O'Connor - Deutsche Bank Erika Najarian - UBS Operator Greetings, and welcome to the Huntington Bancshares Third Quarter Earnings Call. At this time, all participants are in a listen-only mode.

title: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) Surpasses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.63% and 3.71%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: HUNTINGTON BANCSHARES INCORPORATED REPORTS 2022 THIRD-QUARTER EARNINGS
text: Second Consecutive Quarter of Record Net Income with Total Revenue Up 9% Sequentially 2022 Third-Quarter Highlights: Earnings per common share (EPS) for the quarter were $0.39, an increase of $0.04 from the prior quarter. Net interest income increased $143 million, or 11%, from the prior quarter, reflecting net interest margin expansion of 27 basis points to 3.42% and higher average total loans and leases.

title: Huntington Bancshares Q3 Preview; Estimates Indicate Solid Growth
text: The company's top and bottom-lines appear to be in solid shape, both estimated to grow by more than 8% Y/Y.

title: Buy 4 Of 5 Fortune Dividend Dogs To Beat A Turbulent Market
text: Fortune.com October/November issue, page 47, builds a strong case for Dividend Stocks in turbulent times and makes five specific recommendations. The five ‘dividend stocks to beat a turbulent market' include three financial services, one energy, and one basic materials sector member.

title: 3 S&P 500 Bank Stocks Set to Pull Off a Beat in Q3 Earnings
text: Solid loan demand and rising rates leading to improvement in NII are likely to have aided the Q3 earnings of Comerica (CMA), Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) and Zions (ZION).

title: What's in the Offing for Huntington (HBAN) in Q3 Earnings?
text: Huntington's (HBAN) Q3 earnings results are expected to reflect NII growth, backed by higher rates and an improved lending scenario. Increased fee income is also likely to have bolstered the top line.

title: Why Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) is Poised to Beat Earnings Estimates Again
text: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Strength Seen in Huntington Bancshares (HBAN): Can Its 6.6% Jump Turn into More Strength?
text: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions may not translate into further price increase in the near term.

title: Bank Stocks Have Gotten Slammed. Here Are 4 Worth a Look Ahead of Earnings.
text: To those who have never experienced a run-of-the-mill recession, everything looks like a crisis. That could mean bank stocks are due for a run-up.

title: Huntington National Bank Leads Nation for SBA 7(a) Loan Origination by Volume, For Fifth Consecutive Year
text: Huntington Bank infused nearly $1 billion into the economy by supporting 5,675 small businesses in the last year COLUMBUS, Ohio , Oct. 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (Nasdaq: HBAN) is the nation's largest originator, by volume, of Small Business Administration (SBA) 7(a) loans for the fifth consecutive year. As a national leader in the Small Business sector, Huntington remains committed to lending both expertise and capital to sustain small businesses across the country.
